response.justification: The candidate presents a compelling and rare combination of skills. He has founded and developed a geospatial data platform (GISCollective), demonstrating deep domain knowledge directly relevant to the role. Furthermore, his experience at Dunnhumby with high-throughput, low-latency microservices using Dlang is a strong proxy for the C++/Rust requirement, as Dlang is a similar systems programming language. While his direct C++ experience is dated, his proven ability in building relevant systems and his passion for the geospatial domain make him a high-potential candidate worth exploring further.
strengths: Extensive, long-term experience building and maintaining a geospatial data platform (GISCollective).
Proven experience developing high-performance, low-latency distributed systems handling massive traffic.
Deep expertise in Dlang, a systems programming language with similarities to C++, indicating a strong ability to adapt.
concerns: Professional C++ experience is not recent, dating back to 2015.
No explicit experience with Rust is mentioned.
The most recent roles have been focused on TypeScript/Node.js rather than the core languages required for this position.
